title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe is an optional background memory monitoring service integrated into AgentTaskRunner. It uses a local character 3‑gram hash vectorizer (256‑dim) and a separate LLM connection to summarize conversation‑turn memories and filter them by cosine similarity with the current goal when context token utilization exceeds a threshold (default 0.85). Filtered memory IDs are written back to session.selectedMemoryIds, affecting subsequent context resolution. Key design: local embedding zero external dependency, cooling mechanism (30s cooldown, min 3 memories), optional dependency with PepeService.start/stop lifecycle.
